nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for content creation

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to job or skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see AI as taking over my job, but as something that will continue to help me

nodes.label: Professional competence and client satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: don't meet the standards our client expects

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: improving my productivity and reducing time spent on little things

nodes.label: Personal fulfillment through creative engagement
nodes.grounding_span: allow us to focus on what we truly love, the creative design process

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will start working with the AI to create a hierarchy of information, which often means I have to request edits

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation vs. collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: For simple things like extracting feedback... I will delegate this to the AI
